This should produce a deterministic tools report without calling a model.

GitClaw v1 tools are deterministic pre-model context builders. They do not execute shell commands, mutate files, open pull requests, or modify repository state.

Tool output bodies are not included; hashes let maintainers verify exactly which prompt-visible outputs were produced.
